report.summary: UX audit of recent pages, created 11 missing OG images, and fixed touch targets, accessibility, and breadcrumb consistency across airdrops, courses, and ecosystem pages.

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: Ecosystem pages (babylon-protocol, balancer-v3, pancakeswap-v4, stonfi) use inline breadcrumbs instead of reusable Breadcrumb component — missing schema.org structured data
Airdrops page radio buttons critically undersized at 16x16px (WCAG requires 44px touch targets) — fixed to 20x20px with 44px min-height tap area
CoursesHub filter pill buttons at 32-36px height — fixed to 44px min-height for mobile accessibility
Airdrops filter radio groups missing role='radiogroup' and aria-labelledby — added
CourseCard links missing aria-label descriptors — added with course title, level, and XP info
Hyperliquid page using inline breadcrumbs instead of Breadcrumb component — migrated to component
Hyperliquid page CTA buttons missing aria-labels and below 44px touch targets — fixed
Ecosystem pages missing FAQ sections (informational, not yet addressed)
DailyChallenge countdown timer lacks aria-live='polite' (noted for next cycle)

sections.title: UX Fixes Implemented
items: Airdrops: Radio inputs enlarged from h-4/w-4 to h-5/w-5 with min-w-[20px]
Airdrops: Filter labels given min-h-[44px] touch targets with py-1 padding
Airdrops: Added role='radiogroup' + aria-labelledby to all 3 filter groups (chain, status, month)
CoursesHub: Filter pill buttons enlarged from px-3.5/py-1.5 to px-4/py-2.5 with min-h-[44px]
CoursesHub: CourseCard links given descriptive aria-labels
Hyperliquid: Migrated from inline breadcrumbs to Breadcrumb component (gains schema.org markup)
Hyperliquid: Added role='img' + aria-label to protocol icon
Hyperliquid: CTA buttons given aria-labels and min 44px touch targets

sections.title: Backlog for Next Cycle
items: Migrate remaining ecosystem pages from inline breadcrumbs to Breadcrumb component
Add FAQ sections to ecosystem protocol pages
Add aria-live='polite' to DailyChallenge countdown timer
Review useMemo vs useEffect for airdrops countdown timer logic
34 orphaned OG images in /public/ could be cleaned up or linked
